name: auto-js-browser-test
description: Minimal example for checking whether built assets contain syntax unsupported by legacy browsers.

scripts.build:minified: npm run build && terser dist/modern-broken.js -o dist/modern-broken.min.js && terser dist/legacy-safe.js -o dist/legacy-safe.min.js
scripts.ci: npm run build:minified && npm run check:syntax
